name: Laura's Golden Graham Drops
recipeIngredient: 1 cup mini marshmallows (or a little more)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the peanut butter and chocolate chips together until smooth.
2. Allow mixture to cool slightly.
3. Stir in the cereal and marshmallows until combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
5. Set the waxed paper in the refrigerator to allow the drops to set.
